final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: traditional-fine-art
Asset type: Chinese festival illustration, panoramic scroll composition
Primary request: bustling Lantern Festival night scene in ancient Chinese street, Gongbi heavy-color painting style
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese commercial street at night, shops lining both sides, red lanterns glowing against dark sky, distant dragon dance and lion dance troupe, fireworks bursting overhead
Subject: crowds in festive attire, children chasing with rabbit lanterns, vendors selling tangyuan, candied hawthorn, and flower lanterns, dragon and lion dance performers with drums
Style/medium: Gongbi heavy-color painting (工笔重彩), fine brushwork, narrative scroll composition inspired by "Along the River During the Qingming Festival"
Composition/framing: wide panoramic view, densely populated scene, rich layered depth from foreground vendors to distant performers
Lighting/mood: warm lantern glow illuminating night sky, festive and joyous atmosphere
Color palette: dominant red, gold, and orange tones, celebratory and warm
Materials/textures: delicate silk-like surface, precise ink lines, layered mineral pigments
Constraints: maintain Gongbi painting technique with fine details, preserve narrative density of Qingming scroll composition
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, Western perspective, modern elements, deformed figures, flat color blocks
